# TokenMart

> Same GPT, Claude, Gemini and 40+ models — at up to 65% below retail.
> Real savings from GPU-level optimization, not routing tricks.

## About

TokenMart resells official frontier model APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google,
DeepSeek, xAI, ByteDance and others) at a discount enabled by GPU-level
inference optimization, not by re-routing to cheaper models or quantized
clones. The model you call is the model you get.

## Site map

- [Homepage](https://thetokenmart.ai/)
- [Models catalog](https://thetokenmart.ai/models)
- [Blog](https://thetokenmart.ai/blog)
- [Sign up](https://thetokenmart.ai/signup)
- [Terms of service](https://thetokenmart.ai/terms-and-services)

## Blog

- [TokenMart vs OpenRouter: Why the Same Claude Opus Costs 15% Less](https://thetokenmart.ai/blog/tokenmart-vs-openrouter): OpenRouter forwards provider list pricing plus a 5.5% credit fee. TokenMart prices the same models 15–65% below list. Side-by-side breakdown, real numbers, when OpenRouter still wins.
- [How LLM Aggregators Sell Claude Opus 4.7 at $4.25/Mtok Instead of $5.00](https://thetokenmart.ai/blog/llm-aggregator-pricing): The actual mechanic behind the 15–65% discount — volume-tier pass-through, smart routing, prepaid credit bonuses — plus the three situations where going direct still wins.
